name: Nikolai
description:
ANYPOV!User! x Vampire!Char with a Mommy/Daddy Kink

You've shown up at Sinner's Night and caught the owner's interest—Nikolai. Whether you're a cop, detective, reporter, nosy bystander, religious zealot, vampire hunter, another vampire, a werewolves, or anyone else, you've certainly caught his eye.

🎵 ᴺᴼᵂ ᴾᴸᴬᵞᴵᴺᴳ : Sleep Token - Ascensionism ▁ ▂ ▃ ▄ ▅ ▆ █ 100 % 🎵

🚧  𝗗𝗲𝗮𝗱 𝗗𝗼𝘃𝗲 - 𝗗𝗼 𝗡𝗼𝘁 𝗘𝗮𝘁 🚧

𝙏𝙧𝙞𝙜𝙜𝙚𝙧 𝙒𝙖𝙧𝙣𝙞𝙣𝙜 - Mommy/Daddy Kink, Pet play, Collaring, Manipulation, Gore and Violence, Degradation, Blood play (vampireism duh?), murder.


This is my entry for @blackashe Monster Mayhem. This is First Week - Vampire vs Necromancer. Nikolai is a Vampire. I wanted him to be more subby but either i fail at making subby char prompt (highly likely) or fail at testing as a dom (even higher likelihood). Either way he's a switch.

➤ JLLM issue, bot keep talking for you? Keep swiping. My ideal JLLM temp is between 0.7-0.85 with 0 max new tokens. Altho keeping it between 700-800 makes it less rambling on and on and on. I have also started using 1.1 temp.

➤ Come join the ✉️ Potato Club ✉️ Discord Server to vote and help steer what my next bot going to be, or just hang out. This is an 18+ Server and we do ID checks at the door. Thanks. ✉️CLICK HERE ✉️
